asset.title: App Proposals Review
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The preview successfully demonstrates a financial table workflow where cell proposals are reviewed, updated from drafts, and approved with clear visual state transitions.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows cell-level variance calculations and approval states, though the exact trigger mechanism is implicit.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the progression from empty variance cells to draft proposals, and finally to approved states.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode table layout with distinct color-coded chips for different proposal states.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the spreadsheet-based financial collaboration theme of the platform.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Looks like a direct capture of a working UI with realistic financial data and state changes.

legibility.evidence: Text and numbers are highly legible, though some small status icons require close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly relevant to finance and operations users managing collaborative model updates.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step resolution of cell proposals without simulated effects.

observedEvidence: Financial table with Q2 and Q3 columns
Variance column showing draft, locked, and approved states
Interactive state updates occurring sequentially across rows
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Review and approve automated variance proposals directly within your financial model.
